items.title: Potential Houthi threat to Red Sea shipping could further damage global economy
items.dek: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.
items.body: The Iran-backed group could bring a second crucial waterway to a standstill, writes Sebastian Usher.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Composer behind ‘The Lion King' opening vocals sues comedian for $27M over ‘Circle of Life' joke
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Shops and restaurants in Egypt told to close early as energy crisis deepens
items.dek: Retail and dining premises will have to shut by 21:00 each night for the next month to conserve power.
items.body: Retail and dining premises will have to shut by 21:00 each night for the next month to conserve power.
items.author: IriLine Desk
